Ticket Description: My Dyson V15 Detect vacuum cleaner has significantly reduced suction after three weeks of use. I have cleaned the filter and cleared any blockages as per the manual but the problem remains. It can no longer pick up fine dust.

My Whirlpool washing machine vibrates violently during the spin cycle to the point where it moves across the floor. The machine is on a level surface and the load is balanced. This started after the third use.

My Philips air fryer stopped heating after just five uses. It powers on but produces no heat at all. This is clearly a manufacturing defect. The product is well within the warranty period and I am requesting a full replacement.
I purchased the Havells ceiling fan but the invoice I received does not include the GST breakdown required for my business expense claim. I need a proper GST invoice with GSTIN details urgently.

My Bosch dishwasher shows error code E24 and stops mid-cycle. I have checked and cleared the drain filter but the error keeps coming back. The dishes come out half-washed. This is a daily-use appliance and urgently needs resolution.

The Bajaj OTG oven I received had a cracked glass door. The outer packaging was intact so the damage happened during manufacturing or packing. I did not drop or mishandle it. Requesting a replacement unit.

The purified water from my Aquaguard purifier has developed a metallic taste in the past two weeks. The filter was replaced three months ago as per schedule. I am concerned about the water quality and safety.

My Voltas split AC runs continuously but cannot cool the room below 26 degrees even when set to 18 degrees. The gas was recharged six months ago. The problem started when outdoor temperature crossed 38 degrees this summer.

I recently purchased the Prestige induction cooktop but many of my existing pans do not work on it. The product page did not clearly mention compatibility requirements. Please share a full list of compatible cookware types and brands.
My LG double door refrigerator is not maintaining the set temperature. The freezer is fine but the main compartment stays at 12 degrees even when set to 4 degrees. Food is spoiling faster than usual.
